headline: French local elections: In Paris suburbs, LFI won the biggest prize, but made few gains
description: La France Insoumise won Saint-Denis, the largest Paris suburb, in the first round. Yet, the result masks disappointing results in other working-class areas that the radical left has specifically targeted.

headline: War in Iran: 'Spain's resolve stands in stark contrast to France's stance, which seems more accepting of US-Israeli strikes'
description: Historian Laurence Badel analyzes the reasons behind the Spanish government's 'no to war' position and the impact of this decision on the European diplomatic landscape.

headline: Shahed drones are a symbol of cooperation between Tehran and Moscow
description: Exported from Iran to Russia and then locally produced under license, the suicide drone has been enhanced with Russian navigation and jamming technologies, similar to some missiles used by Iran in the war launched by the US and Israel.

headline: PSG crush Chelsea to reach Champions League quarter-finals
description: Thanks to the 3-0 win on Tuesday, Paris Saint-Germain's dream of retaining the Champions League title remains very much alive, a year after winning the trophy for the first time in their history.

headline: Rosalía launches her world tour in Lyon
description: The Spanish pop star kicked off her Lux World Tour on Monday at the LDLC Arena, on the outskirts of Lyon, in a whirlwind of style, language and religious imagery.

headline: Michelin Guide 2026: Michaël Arnoult, the only new three-star chef
description: The chef at Les Morainières earned a coveted third star in the latest edition of the Michelin Guide, which was unveiled in Monaco on Monday. It was a triumph for the reserved master chef.

headline: Serbia emerges as main hub for Russian destabilization operations in Europe
description: Three Serbian nationals were sentenced at the end of December 2025 for placing pig heads in front of mosques in the Paris region – an operation explicitly linked to the Kremlin.
